target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit PostgreSQL-only casts, dollar quoting, or language clauses unless Snowflake explicitly supports an equivalent.

unsupported_object_types.trigger: Snowflake does not support PostgreSQL-style table triggers directly. Convert them manually to a Snowflake stream/task/procedure pattern.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for Snowflake in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.synonym: Snowflake synonym migration is not supported by this tool for PostgreSQL sources.

table: Convert PostgreSQL table syntax to valid Snowflake DDL with compatible data types and defaults.
view: Convert PostgreSQL view syntax to valid Snowflake view syntax.
storedprocedure: Convert PostgreSQL procedure syntax to valid Snowflake procedure syntax.
function: Convert PostgreSQL function syntax to valid Snowflake function syntax.
sequence: Convert PostgreSQL sequences to valid Snowflake CREATE SEQUENCE syntax when present.
